summary: Completed comprehensive testing of memory search bug fixes and ActionCard positioning improvements. All 223 unit tests pass, and all 8 specific bug fix validations pass.
passed_tests: All 223 unit tests pass (pnpm vitest run)
kvFallbackSearch returns EMPTY array when no keyword matches (not 3 recent memories)
emotionalWeight and confidence boosts only apply when keywordScore > 0
minimum score threshold of >= 2 for returned results
short words (length <= 2) are filtered from query words
ActionCard positioned as fixed container at z-50 (not inside voice button wrapper)
ActionCard no longer uses position:absolute with bottom:100%
useActionEngine has console.warn for errors and handles empty messages
test 'should return empty when no keyword matches' expects 0 results
